The coffee they sell at ACA is exquisite, and the service is very, very good!

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención de los playeros, te atienden así nomás, te pispean el auto por adentro y te tratan de mala gana. Uno tampoco pide que lo trate con cara de feliz cumpleaños.
Hay un tipo que no es del lugar que está viendo cuando cobran encima de uno, este hombre vive en la calle. Todo esto más que el playero dejo que el tipo este al lado mío en la caja mientras contaba el efectivo.
Un desastre no vuelvo nunca más.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas station was a disaster. They treat you like you're nothing, they peek inside your car, and they're generally rude. You don't expect to be treated like you're having a birthday party.
There's a guy who doesn't seem to be from around here watching you while they're charging you; this guy is homeless. On top of that, the attendant let this guy stand next to me at the register while he was counting the cash. It was a disaster. I'm never going back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCa1RUSlpWbXRmWDB0T2JrMDFkVWRoWWs1Qk0yYxAB

reviews.comment:
Rápido, expedito, buen servicio y buena ubicación... Aunque si querés bajar a tomarte un café mucho espacio no tenes.

(Translated by Google)
Fast, efficient, good service and good location... Although if you want to go down for a coffee there isn't much space.

(Original)

reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros es asquerosa mal, parece que les pesa el cuerpo, encima una cara de odio y resentimiento, no solo a mi. Eh ido en varias ocasiones, con distintas personas y vehículos, siempre igual, lentos y mala onda. Acostumbrado a la estación que esta antes del puente, no se compara. Pero si los empleados son asi probablemente el problema viene de arriba, empleador explotador y soberbio genera empleados tristes y oscuros. Saludos

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants is disgusting, they seem to feel like they're weighed down by their bodies, and on top of that, they have a look of hatred and resentment, not just mine. I've been there several times, with different people and vehicles, always the same, slow and rude. I'm used to the station before the bridge, and it's no comparison. But if the employees are like this, the problem probably comes from above. An exploitative and arrogant employer creates sad and gloomy employees. Greetings.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21kc1QyOVpPVkJZVWtsNlMxZEJXR1JaUkdoWVZYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Viajando de Bs As a Bariloche después de transitar ruta en mal estado me apareció un ruido en el auto que crei era del tren delantero, al concurrir a la estación de servicio me derivaron a la base de auxilio mecánico donde fui atendido el lynes 22/09 a las 10 hs por dos empleados (lamentablemente no tome sus nombres) quienes me atendieron de forma rápida y con mucha eficiencia. Con mucha buena voluntad revisaron el tren delantero no encontrando averías pero si la cortadura de un tornillo en el chapon , inconveniente que fue solucionado a la brevedad y pude continuar mi viaje con tranquilidad. Muchas gracias !!!

(Translated by Google)
Traveling from Buenos Aires to Bariloche, after driving on a poorly maintained road, I noticed a noise in the car that I thought was coming from the front suspension. When I went to the gas station, they directed me to the roadside assistance center where I was seen on Monday, September 22nd at 10:00 AM by two employees (unfortunately, I didn't get their names) who helped me quickly and efficiently. They very helpfully inspected the front suspension and found no damage, but they did find a bolt cut into the skid plate. This problem was fixed promptly, and I was able to continue my trip without worry. Thank you very much!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWWFgwZEVXbWt4YTBKVmVqVnRYMHBKU0ZkWlMwRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace años cargo combustible en la YPF del ACA de Rivadavia y el Boulevard en Neuquen. Me han surgido inconvenientes, que rápidamente fueron solucionados! Hoy, a la distancia, un empleado resolvió una situación muy importante para mí. He necesitado el remolque en varias oportunidades y, siempre responden con diligencia y esmero! Gracias de todo corazón! Desde San Martín de los Andes, los sigo eligiendo!🙌

(Translated by Google)
For years, I've been fueling up at YPF at the Rivadavia and Boulevard stations in Neuquén. I've had issues, but they were quickly resolved! Today, from a distance, an employee resolved a very important situation for me. I've needed a tow truck on several occasions, and they always respond with diligence and care! Thank you from the bottom of my heart! From San Martín de los Andes, I'll keep choosing you! 🙌
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25KMlRtOHpRMk5VWjB0R1MyRjRWRWRvYTFZM1RXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Shopping con muy buena atención. Estacionamiento excelente; el muchacho que lo atiende, si se presenta al mundial de Tetris, lo gana..Un maestro. Te estaciona un semi, con los ojos cerrados. Todos los medios de pago.

(Translated by Google)
A shopping center with excellent service. Excellent parking; the guy who works there, if he shows up for the Tetris World Cup, will win... A master. He'll park a semi-truck for you, eyes closed. All payment methods accepted.
